description: Contains running activity data fetched from Strava, with time in heart rate zones and pace per zone.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the run as recorded on Strava

columns.name: duration
columns.description: Total moving time of the run

columns.name: pace
columns.description: Average pace over the entire run

columns.name: elevation_gain
columns.description: Total elevation gain during the run

columns.name: time_z1
columns.description: Total time spent in HR zone 1, including stationary segments

columns.name: time_z2
columns.description: Total time spent in HR zone 2, including stationary segments

columns.name: time_z3
columns.description: Total time spent in HR zone 3, including stationary segments

columns.name: time_z4
columns.description: Total time spent in HR zone 4, including stationary segments

columns.name: time_z5
columns.description: Total time spent in HR zone 5, including stationary segments

columns.name: pace_z1
columns.description: Average pace in HR zone 1, excluding stationary segments

columns.name: pace_z2
columns.description: Average pace in HR zone 2, excluding stationary segments

columns.name: pace_z3
columns.description: Average pace in HR zone 3, excluding stationary segments

columns.name: pace_z4
columns.description: Average pace in HR zone 4, excluding stationary segments

columns.name: pace_z5
columns.description: Average pace in HR zone 5, excluding stationary segments
